name: Jumpscare Scare Jump
short_description: This is a casual horror game similar to a haunted attraction, where you search for 50 jumpscares. Whether you like them or not, this game will help you build up your tolerance to them!!
detailed_description:
A casual horror game, similar to a haunted attraction, with an emphasis on jumpscare.

All you have to do is explore the mysterious house, and find 50 jumpscares.

The type and location of jumpscares change randomly each time, and there are over 100 different types, from simple to hidden.

Discover all the jumpscares and escape from this house of terror.

If you like horror games but don't like jumpscares, try this game to improve your tolerance for surprises.

It also has a mode that shows a warning shortly before a scare occurs.

Warning

This game contains loud sounds and scare scenes.

If you feel tired while playing, take a break.

We cannot be responsible for any problems caused by playing this game.

About Streaming and uploading video

You can play this game live or upload videos at your own risk, and monetize those videos.

If possible, I would appreciate it if you could include a link to your store page in the description section
